{{Quote|The forest provided cover for the Rebel teams, but it also hid Ghost Base from those who wished to find it.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
'''Ghost Base''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base operated by Rebel spy [[Utric Sandov]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Krant]]. It was captured by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]] and [[Strike force Alpha]] around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], but the Rebel staff escaped to the nearby [[Le'Roche]] island. The Imperials established a base of their own there, which consisted of a [[Command center]] at least two [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]], a war center, and a gate along with some remnants of the Rebel base. The Imperials, after creating their base, protected the base with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]]. A Rebel strike force, led by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] later retook the base and drove the Imperials out. Sandov then contacted Organa and sent [[Transport/Legends|transports]] to bring her to Le'Roche.

==Behind the scenes==
Ghost Base appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' during the Leia Organa campaign. The campaign was later included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
